_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #57 Purchase Coordinator implementation removed. The reserve could not restrain autoLevelEquipment (dispatched 60 lines earlier in the same tick, unguarded); the release path bypassed WarpstationCap (default ON), WarpstationWall3 and 'Buy Buildings = Buy Neither'; the reserve was mispriced (raw getBuildingItemPrice, no Resourceful discount) and metal-only while Warpstation costs gems too; it blocked Forge, the metal-CAP building, while hoarding metal; and it leaked {active,reserved} across a U1->U2 portal with no release path. The ON path was never validated by any trace, test or A/B. Idea retained in #57.
